info.name: Get time entries within a date range

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

params.name: start_date
params.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the start of the date range.

params.name: end_date
params.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the end of the date range.

params.name: assignee
params.description: Comma-separated list of user IDs to filter by assignees.

params.name: include_task_tags
params.description: Include tags from the associated tasks.

params.name: include_location_names
params.description: Include names of the spaces, folders, and lists.

params.name: space_id
params.description: Filter by Space ID.

params.name: folder_id
params.description: Filter by Folder ID.

params.name: list_id
params.description: Filter by List ID.

params.name: task_id
params.description: Filter by Task ID.

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: If true, the task_id parameter should be a custom task ID.

items.docs: Retrieves time entries within a specified date range for a Workspace. Results can be filtered by assignees and task IDs. Returns time entries with their duration, start time, end time, and associated task information.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: If true, the tid parameter should be a custom task ID.

items.docs: Creates a manual time entry for a task in a Workspace. The time entry requires a start timestamp and duration. Optionally, a description, tags, and billable status can be included.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

params.name: timer_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the time entry.

items.docs: Retrieves details of a specific time entry by its ID.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

params.name: timer_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the time entry.

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: If true, the tid parameter should be a custom task ID.

items.docs: Updates an existing time entry. The start time, end time, duration, description, tags, and billable status can be modified.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

params.name: timer_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the time entry.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a time entry. This action cannot be undone.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

params.name: assignee
params.description: User ID to get the running timer for. Defaults to the authenticated user.

items.docs: Retrieves the currently running time entry (timer) for the authenticated user within a Workspace.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

params.name: timer_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the time entry.

items.docs: Starts a timer for a specific time entry. If another timer is already running, it will be stopped first.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

items.docs: Stops the currently running timer for the authenticated user within a Workspace.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

items.docs: Retrieves all tags that have been used on time entries within a Workspace.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

items.docs: Adds tags to one or more time entries within a Workspace.
